---
title: "QC Checks"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)

# ---- AUTO-SAVE PNG + PDF FOR EVERY PLOT ----
knitr::knit_hooks$set(plot = function(x, options) {
  outdir <- "docs"
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Base filename (chunk label or auto-generated)
  name <- options$label
  if (is.null(name) || name == "") {
    name <- paste0("plot-", knitr::opts_current$get("chunk.id"))
  }

  # Save PNG
  pngfile <- file.path(outdir, paste0(name, ".png"))
  grDevices::png(pngfile, width = 800, height = 600, res = 120)
  print(x)
  grDevices::dev.off()

  # Save PDF
  pdffile <- file.path(outdir, paste0(name, ".pdf"))
  grDevices::pdf(pdffile, width = 7, height = 5)
  print(x)
  grDevices::dev.off()

  # Return plot to appear in the knitted document
  knitr::hook_plot_md(x, options)
})

```

```{r Setting_Up_Enviroment, include=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}

####Library Loading####
library("Rsamtools")
library("rtracklayer")
library("GenomicRanges")
library("IRanges")
library("patchwork")
library("edgeR")
library("ggplot2")
library("tibble")
library("dplyr")
library("ggrepel")
library("readr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("pheatmap")
library("Cormotif")
library("tidyverse")
library("workflowr")
library("RUVSeq")
library("SummarizedExperiment")
library("readxl")
library("ggfortify")
library("ComplexHeatmap")
library("tidyr")
library("forcats")
library("AnnotationHub")
library("GenomicAlignments")
library("ChIPseeker")
library("TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene")
library("GenomeInfoDb")


# install.packages("Rtools")
# BiocManager::install("TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene")

#Objects made but loaded as needed
# cuttag_metadata <-readRDS("data/Raw_Data/cuttag_metadata.RDS")
# Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
# Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
# Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
# H3K27ac_fragment_counts <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/H3K27ac_fragment_counts.RDS")
# Master_Reproducible4_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Master_Reproducible4_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover.RDS")
# Master_Reproducible3_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Master_Reproducible3_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover.RDS")
# Master_Reproducible2_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Master_Reproducible2_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover.RDS")
# GRCh38_unified_blacklist <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/GRCh38_unified_blacklist.RDS")
# peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2 <-readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
# peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
# map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
# peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3 <-readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
# peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
# peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
# peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
# map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
# peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4 <-readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
# peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4 <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")

#Loading objects used in this workbook
ann_colors <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/ann_colors.RDS")
H3K27ac_Metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_MetaData.RDS")
H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")


```

```{r Making_Plotting_Function}
plot_stage <- function(stage_name, data, ann_colors) {
  
  df <- data %>%
    filter(Stage == stage_name)
  
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Timepoint, y = log2CPM)) +
    
    geom_boxplot(
      aes(fill = Species, group = interaction(Timepoint, Species)),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      alpha = 0.3,
      outlier.shape = NA
    ) +
    
    scale_fill_manual(values = ann_colors$species_cor) +
    
    geom_jitter(
      aes(color = Individual),
      position = position_jitterdodge(
        jitter.width = 0.15,
        dodge.width = 0.8
      ),
      size = 1,
      alpha = 0.6
    ) +
    
    scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$individual_cor) +
    
    geom_line(
      stat = "summary",
      fun = mean,
      aes(group = Species, linetype = Species),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      linewidth = 1
    ) +
    
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(C = "dotted", H = "solid")) +
    
    geom_point(
      stat = "summary",
      fun = mean,
      aes(shape = Species),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      size = 2
    ) +
    
    facet_wrap(~ Gene, scales = "free_y") +
    
    theme_classic() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    
    ggtitle(stage_name)
}
```

```{r Making_frag_distribution}
plot_timepoint_c <- function(tp) {
  p <- frag_counts_meta %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Species == "C", Timepoint == tp) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = length, y = count)) +
      geom_line(stat = "identity") +
      facet_grid(Species ~ SampleName) +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(tp)

  print(p)   # <-- REQUIRED so knitr hook saves PNG + PDF
  p          # also return it for display
}

plot_timepoint_h <- function(tp) {
  p <- frag_counts_meta %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Species == "H", Timepoint == tp) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = length, y = count)) +
      geom_line(stat = "identity") +
      facet_grid(Species ~ SampleName) +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(tp)

  print(p)   # <-- REQUIRED so knitr hook saves PNG + PDF
  p          # also return it for display
}

plot_day_bar_H <- function(day_value) {
  p <- bar_df %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Species == "H", Day == day_value) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = SampleName, y = prop, fill = frag_class)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      facet_wrap(~ Day, scales = "free_x") +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(day_value)

  print(p)   # triggers knitr auto-save hook
  p          # returns plot for display
}

plot_day_bar_C <- function(day_value) {
  p <- bar_df %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Species == "C", Day == day_value) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = SampleName, y = prop, fill = frag_class)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      facet_wrap(~ Day, scales = "free_x") +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(day_value)

  print(p)   # triggers knitr auto-save hook
  p          # returns plot for display
}

plot_day_bar_counts_H <- function(day_value) {

  p <- bar_df %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Species == "H", Day == day_value) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = SampleName, y = count, fill = frag_class)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      facet_wrap(~ Day, scales = "free_x") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5e7)) +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(paste("Counts for", day_value))

  print(p)
  p
}



plot_day_bar_counts_C <- function(day_value) {

  p <- bar_df %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Species == "C", Day == day_value) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = SampleName, y = count, fill = frag_class)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
      facet_wrap(~ Day, scales = "free_x") +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5e7)) +
      theme_bw() +
      ggtitle(paste("Counts for", day_value))

  print(p)
  p
}
```


```{r FrIP_Scoring_function}

compute_frip_minimal <- function(bam_files, peak_files) {
  results <- lapply(seq_along(bam_files), function(i) {
    bam   <- bam_files[i]
    peaks <- peak_files[i]
    sample_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(bam))

    reads <- readGAlignments(bam)

    pk <- import(peaks)
    pk <- reduce(pk)

    hits <- countOverlaps(reads, pk)
    reads_in_peaks <- sum(hits > 0)
    total_reads    <- length(reads)
    frip           <- reads_in_peaks / total_reads

    data.frame(
      sample         = sample_name,
      reads_in_peaks = reads_in_peaks,
      total_reads    = total_reads,
      FRiP           = frip
    )
  })

  bind_rows(results)
}


```

#Data Upload and Stats


##Reproducible2
```{r Filtering_BlackListRegions_Mappability_Reproducible2, results="hide"}

Master_Reproducible2_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Master_Reproducible2_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover.RDS")

GRCh38_unified_blacklist <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/GRCh38_unified_blacklist.RDS")

Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")

peaks <- Master_Reproducible2_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover
blacklist <- GRCh38_unified_blacklist
featurecounts_table <- Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc

# # ---------------------------
# # BUILD GRanges
# 
# peaks_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = peaks$V1,
#     ranges = IRanges(start = peaks$V2, end = peaks$V3)
# )
# 
# names(peaks_gr) <- as.character(seq_len(length(peaks_gr)))
# 
# saveRDS(peaks_gr,"data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# # peaks_gr <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
# 
# 
# blacklist_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = blacklist$V1,
#     ranges = IRanges(start = blacklist$V2,
#                      end = blacklist$V3)
# )
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # BLACKLIST FILTERING
# # ---------------------------
# hits <- findOverlaps(peaks_gr, blacklist_gr)
# 
# blacklist_idx <- unique(queryHits(hits))
# 
# keep_blacklist <- !(seq_along(peaks_gr) %in% blacklist_idx)
# 
# peaks_bl <- peaks_gr[keep_blacklist]
# featurecounts_bl <- featurecounts_table[keep_blacklist, ]
# 
# saveRDS(peaks_bl,"data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
peaks_bl <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")

# bw_file <- "data/Peaks/k50.Umap.MultiTrackMappability.bw"
# seqlevelsStyle(peaks_bl) <- "UCSC"
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # QUERY BIGWIG ONLY AT PEAK LOCI
# map_gr <- import(bw_file, which = peaks_bl)
# 
# saveRDS(map_gr,"data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
map_gr <- readRDS("data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")


# # ---------------------------
# # OVERLAPS
# hits <- findOverlaps(peaks_bl, map_gr)
# 
# df <- data.frame(
#     peak_idx = queryHits(hits),
#     score = mcols(map_gr)$score[subjectHits(hits)],
#     width = width(map_gr)[subjectHits(hits)]
# )
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # PER-PEAK MAPPABILITY (WEIGHTED MEAN)
# map_sum <- aggregate(
#     score * width ~ peak_idx,
#     data = df,
#     FUN = sum
# )
# 
# width_sum <- aggregate(
#     width ~ peak_idx,
#     data = df,
#     FUN = sum
# )
# 
# map_df <- merge(map_sum, width_sum, by = "peak_idx")
# 
# map_df$map <- map_df$`score * width` / map_df$width
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # ALIGN TO FULL PEAK SET
# peak_map <- rep(0, length(peaks_bl))
# peak_map[map_df$peak_idx] <- map_df$map
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # FILTER PEAKS
# keep <- peak_map >= 0.8
# saveRDS(keep,"data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
keep <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")

# peaks_filt <- peaks_bl[keep]
# saveRDS(peaks_filt,"data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")

# featurecounts_filt <- featurecounts_bl[keep, ]
# saveRDS(featurecounts_filt,"data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
featurecounts_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")

# ---------------------------
# SAFETY CHECK
stopifnot(length(peaks_filt) == nrow(featurecounts_filt))

cat("Original peaks Reproducible2:", length(peaks_gr), "\n")
cat("NoBL peaks Reproducible2:", length(peaks_bl), "\n")
cat("Fraction retained Reproducible2:", length(peaks_bl) / length(peaks_gr), "\n")
cat("After mappability filter Reproducible2:", length(peaks_filt), "\n")
cat("Fraction retained Reproducible2:", mean(keep), "\n")

```

###Genomic Region Proportions
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_GenomicRegions,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}

peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")
featurecounts_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")


# Ensure peak order matches counts table
# --------------------------------------------------

idx <- match(
    rownames(featurecounts_filt),
    names(peaks_filt)
)

# Check all peaks are present
stopifnot(sum(is.na(idx)) == 0)

# Reorder peaks to match featureCounts
peaks_filt <- peaks_filt[idx]

# Confirm exact alignment
stopifnot(
    all(names(peaks_filt) == rownames(featurecounts_filt))
)

# Annotate peaks
# --------------------------------------------------

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

peaks_filt_anno <- annotatePeak(
    peaks_filt,
    TxDb = txdb,
    annoDb = "org.Hs.eg.db"
)


anno_df <- as.data.frame(peaks_filt_anno)

class(anno_df)
str(anno_df$annotation)

anno_df$annotation[1:10]

# Collapse annotation categories
# --------------------------------------------------

anno_df$annotation_group <- dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation) ~ anno_df$annotation,
    grepl("Exon", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Exon",
    grepl("Intron", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intron",
    grepl("UTR", anno_df$annotation) ~ "UTR",
    grepl("Downstream", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Downstream",
    grepl("Intergenic", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intergenic",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
)


anno_counts <- anno_df %>%
    dplyr::count(annotation_group) %>%
    mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n))


# Plot annotation distribution
# --------------------------------------------------

ggplot(
    anno_counts,
    aes(
        x = "All Peaks",
        y = percent,
        fill = annotation_group
    )
) +
    geom_col(color = "black") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Percent of peaks",
        fill = "Genomic annotation Reproducible2 \n Condition Filtering CPM>2 in =>4"
    ) +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "right"
    )


length(peaks_filt)


# Extract promoter peaks
# --------------------------------------------------

promoter_idx <- grepl(
    "^Promoter",
    anno_df$annotation
)


# Keep GRanges object
promoter_peaks <- peaks_filt[promoter_idx]


# Subset featureCounts using peak IDs
featurecounts_promoter <- featurecounts_filt[
    names(promoter_peaks),
]


# Check alignment
stopifnot(
    all(names(promoter_peaks) == rownames(featurecounts_promoter))
)


dim(promoter_peaks)
dim(featurecounts_promoter)


# Save objects
# --------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
    promoter_peaks,
    "data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_GRanges.RDS"
)

saveRDS(
    featurecounts_promoter,
    "data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS"
)                                  

```

###Filtered Genomic Region Proportions
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_GenomicRegions_Filtered,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}

peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")

featurecounts_FilteredCondition <- readRDS(
    "data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition.RDS")


# Ensure peak order matches counts table
# --------------------------------------------------

idx <- match(
    rownames(featurecounts_FilteredCondition),
    names(peaks_filt)
)

# Check all peaks are present
stopifnot(sum(is.na(idx)) == 0)

# Reorder peaks to match featureCounts
peaks_filt <- peaks_filt[idx]

# Confirm exact alignment
stopifnot(
    all(names(peaks_filt) == rownames(featurecounts_FilteredCondition))
)

# Annotate peaks
# --------------------------------------------------

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

peaks_filt_anno <- annotatePeak(
    peaks_filt,
    TxDb = txdb,
    annoDb = "org.Hs.eg.db"
)


anno_df <- as.data.frame(peaks_filt_anno)

class(anno_df)
str(anno_df$annotation)

anno_df$annotation[1:10]

# Collapse annotation categories
# --------------------------------------------------

anno_df$annotation_group <- dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation) ~ anno_df$annotation,
    grepl("Exon", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Exon",
    grepl("Intron", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intron",
    grepl("UTR", anno_df$annotation) ~ "UTR",
    grepl("Downstream", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Downstream",
    grepl("Intergenic", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intergenic",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
)


anno_counts <- anno_df %>%
    dplyr::count(annotation_group) %>%
    mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n))


# Plot annotation distribution
# --------------------------------------------------

ggplot(
    anno_counts,
    aes(
        x = "All Peaks",
        y = percent,
        fill = annotation_group
    )
) +
    geom_col(color = "black") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Percent of peaks",
        fill = "Genomic annotation Reproducible2 \n Condition Filtering CPM>2 in =>4"
    ) +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "right"
    )


length(peaks_filt)


# Extract promoter peaks
# --------------------------------------------------

promoter_idx <- grepl(
    "^Promoter",
    anno_df$annotation
)


# Keep GRanges object
promoter_peaks <- peaks_filt[promoter_idx]


# Subset featureCounts using peak IDs
featurecounts_promoter <- featurecounts_FilteredCondition[
    names(promoter_peaks),
]


# Check alignment
stopifnot(
    all(names(promoter_peaks) == rownames(featurecounts_promoter))
)


dim(promoter_peaks)
dim(featurecounts_promoter)


# Save objects
# --------------------------------------------------

saveRDS(
    promoter_peaks,
    "data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_FilteredCondition_GRanges.RDS"
)

saveRDS(
    featurecounts_promoter,
    "data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS"
)                                  

```

##Reproducible3
```{r Filtering_BlackListRegions_Mappability_Reproducible3, results="hide"}
# Master_Reproducible3_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Master_Reproducible3_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover.RDS")
# 
# peaks <- Master_Reproducible3_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover
# 
# GRCh38_unified_blacklist <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/GRCh38_unified_blacklist.RDS")
# 
# blacklist <- GRCh38_unified_blacklist
# 
# Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
# 
# featurecounts_table <- Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc
# 
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # BUILD GRanges
# # ---------------------------
# peaks_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = peaks$V1,
#     ranges = IRanges(start = peaks$V2, end = peaks$V3)
# )
# saveRDS(peaks_gr,"data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
peaks_gr <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")

# blacklist_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = blacklist$V1,
#     ranges = IRanges(start = blacklist$V2,
#                      end = blacklist$V3)
# )
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # BLACKLIST FILTERING
# # ---------------------------
# hits <- findOverlaps(peaks_gr, blacklist_gr)
# 
# blacklist_idx <- unique(queryHits(hits))
# 
# keep_blacklist <- !(seq_along(peaks_gr) %in% blacklist_idx)
# 
# peaks_bl <- peaks_gr[keep_blacklist]
# featurecounts_bl <- featurecounts_table[keep_blacklist, ]
# saveRDS(peaks_bl,"data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
peaks_bl <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")

# cat("Original peaks:", length(peaks_gr), "\n")
# cat("After blacklist:", length(peaks_bl), "\n")
# 
# bw_file <- "data/Peaks/k50.Umap.MultiTrackMappability.bw"
# seqlevelsStyle(peaks_bl) <- "UCSC"
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # QUERY BIGWIG ONLY AT PEAK LOCI
# # ---------------------------
# map_gr <- import(bw_file, which = peaks_bl)
# 
# saveRDS(map_gr,"data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
map_gr <- readRDS("data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")

# ---------------------------
# OVERLAPS
# ---------------------------
# hits <- findOverlaps(peaks_bl, map_gr)
# 
# df <- data.frame(
#     peak_idx = queryHits(hits),
#     score = mcols(map_gr)$score[subjectHits(hits)],
#     width = width(map_gr)[subjectHits(hits)]
# )
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # PER-PEAK MAPPABILITY (WEIGHTED MEAN)
# # ---------------------------
# map_sum <- aggregate(
#     score * width ~ peak_idx,
#     data = df,
#     FUN = sum
# )
# 
# width_sum <- aggregate(
#     width ~ peak_idx,
#     data = df,
#     FUN = sum
# )
# 
# map_df <- merge(map_sum, width_sum, by = "peak_idx")
# 
# map_df$map <- map_df$`score * width` / map_df$width
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # ALIGN TO FULL PEAK SET
# # ---------------------------
# peak_map <- rep(0, length(peaks_bl))
# peak_map[map_df$peak_idx] <- map_df$map
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # FILTER PEAKS
# # ---------------------------
# keep <- peak_map >= 0.8
# saveRDS(keep,"data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")
keep <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")

# peaks_filt <- peaks_bl[keep]
# saveRDS(peaks_filt,"data/Data_Sets/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")

# featurecounts_filt <- featurecounts_bl[keep, ]
# 
# saveRDS(featurecounts_filt,"data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
featurecounts_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")

# ---------------------------
# SAFETY CHECK
# ---------------------------
stopifnot(length(peaks_filt) == nrow(featurecounts_filt))

# ---------------------------
# SUMMARY
# ---------------------------
cat("Original peaks Reproducible3:", length(peaks_gr), "\n")
cat("NoBL peaks Reproducible3:", length(peaks_bl), "\n")
cat("Fraction retained Reproducible3:", length(peaks_bl) / length(peaks_gr), "\n")
cat("After mappability filter Reproducible3:", length(peaks_filt), "\n")
cat("Fraction retained Reproducible3:", mean(keep), "\n")
```

###Genomic Region Proportions
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_GenomicRegions,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}

peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
featurecounts_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

peaks_filt_anno <- annotatePeak(
  peaks_filt,
  TxDb = txdb,
  annoDb = "org.Hs.eg.db"
)

anno_df <- as.data.frame(peaks_filt_anno)
class(anno_df)
str(anno_df$annotation)
anno_df$annotation[1:10]

anno_df$annotation_group <- dplyr::case_when(
  grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation) ~ anno_df$annotation,  # KEEP original promoter label
  grepl("Exon", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Exon",
  grepl("Intron", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intron",
  grepl("UTR", anno_df$annotation) ~ "UTR",
  grepl("Downstream", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Downstream",
  grepl("Intergenic", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intergenic",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)


anno_counts <- anno_df %>%
  dplyr::count(annotation_group) %>%
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n))



ggplot(anno_counts,
       aes(x = "All Peaks",
           y = percent,
           fill = annotation_group)) +
  geom_col(color = "black") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Percent of peaks",
    fill = "Genomic annotation Reproducible3"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

length(peaks_filt)

promoter_peaks <- anno_df[
    grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation),
]

dim(promoter_peaks)

saveRDS(promoter_peaks,"data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3.RDS")

promoter_idx <- grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation)

featurecounts_promoter <- featurecounts_filt[promoter_idx,]

dim(featurecounts_promoter)

saveRDS(featurecounts_promoter,"data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")                                         

```


##Reproducible4
```{r Filtering_BlackListRegions_Mappability_Reproducible4, results="hide"}

# Master_Reproducible4_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Master_Reproducible4_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover.RDS")
# 
# peaks <- Master_Reproducible4_Orthologous_Reciprocal90_inhg38_sorted_merged_annotated_AfterLiftover
# 
# GRCh38_unified_blacklist <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/GRCh38_unified_blacklist.RDS")
# 
# blacklist <- GRCh38_unified_blacklist
# 
# Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
# 
# featurecounts_table <- Raw_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc


# ---------------------------
# BUILD GRanges
# ---------------------------
# peaks_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = peaks$V1,
#     ranges = IRanges(start = peaks$V2, end = peaks$V3)
# )
# saveRDS(peaks_gr,"data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
peaks_gr <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_gr_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")

# blacklist_gr <- GRanges(
#     seqnames = blacklist$V1,
#     ranges = IRanges(start = blacklist$V2,
#                      end = blacklist$V3)
# )
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # BLACKLIST FILTERING
# # ---------------------------
# hits <- findOverlaps(peaks_gr, blacklist_gr)
# 
# blacklist_idx <- unique(queryHits(hits))
# 
# keep_blacklist <- !(seq_along(peaks_gr) %in% blacklist_idx)
# 
# peaks_bl <- peaks_gr[keep_blacklist]
# saveRDS(peaks_bl,"data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
peaks_bl <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_bl_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
# 
# featurecounts_bl <- featurecounts_table[keep_blacklist, ]
# 
# cat("Original peaks:", length(peaks_gr), "\n")
# cat("After blacklist:", length(peaks_bl), "\n")
# 
# bw_file <- "data/Peaks/k50.Umap.MultiTrackMappability.bw"
# seqlevelsStyle(peaks_bl) <- "UCSC"
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # QUERY BIGWIG ONLY AT PEAK LOCI
# # ---------------------------
# map_gr <- import(bw_file, which = peaks_bl)
# 
# saveRDS(map_gr,"data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
map_gr <- readRDS("data/Peaks/map_gr_blacklist_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")

# # ---------------------------
# # OVERLAPS
# # ---------------------------
# hits <- findOverlaps(peaks_bl, map_gr)
# 
# df <- data.frame(
#     peak_idx = queryHits(hits),
#     score = mcols(map_gr)$score[subjectHits(hits)],
#     width = width(map_gr)[subjectHits(hits)]
# )
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # PER-PEAK MAPPABILITY (WEIGHTED MEAN)
# # ---------------------------
# map_sum <- aggregate(
#     score * width ~ peak_idx,
#     data = df,
#     FUN = sum
# )
# 
# width_sum <- aggregate(
#     width ~ peak_idx,
#     data = df,
#     FUN = sum
# )
# 
# map_df <- merge(map_sum, width_sum, by = "peak_idx")
# 
# map_df$map <- map_df$`score * width` / map_df$width
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # ALIGN TO FULL PEAK SET
# # ---------------------------
# peak_map <- rep(0, length(peaks_bl))
# peak_map[map_df$peak_idx] <- map_df$map
# 
# # ---------------------------
# # FILTER PEAKS
# # ---------------------------
# keep <- peak_map >= 0.8
# 
# saveRDS(keep,"data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")
keep <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_keep_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")

# peaks_filt <- peaks_bl[keep]
# 
# featurecounts_filt <- featurecounts_bl[keep, ]
# 
# names(peaks_filt) <- rownames(featurecounts_filt)
# 
# # saveRDS(peaks_filt,"data/Data_Sets/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
# peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
# 
# saveRDS(featurecounts_filt,"data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
featurecounts_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")

# ---------------------------
# SAFETY CHECK
# ---------------------------
# stopifnot(length(peaks_filt) == nrow(featurecounts_filt))

# ---------------------------
# SUMMARY
# ---------------------------
cat("Original peaks Reproducible4:", length(peaks_gr), "\n")
cat("NoBL peaks Reproducible4:", length(peaks_bl), "\n")
cat("Fraction retained Reproducible4:", length(peaks_bl) / length(peaks_gr), "\n")
cat("After mappability filter Reproducible4:", length(peaks_filt), "\n")
cat("Fraction retained Reproducible4:", mean(keep), "\n")
```
###Genomic Region Proportions
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_GenomicRegions,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}

peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
featurecounts_filt <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")

txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene

peaks_filt_anno <- annotatePeak(
  peaks_filt,
  TxDb = txdb,
  annoDb = "org.Hs.eg.db"
)

anno_df <- as.data.frame(peaks_filt_anno)
class(anno_df)
str(anno_df$annotation)
anno_df$annotation[1:10]

anno_df$annotation_group <- dplyr::case_when(
  grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation) ~ anno_df$annotation,  # KEEP original promoter label
  grepl("Exon", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Exon",
  grepl("Intron", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intron",
  grepl("UTR", anno_df$annotation) ~ "UTR",
  grepl("Downstream", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Downstream",
  grepl("Intergenic", anno_df$annotation) ~ "Intergenic",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)


anno_counts <- anno_df %>%
  dplyr::count(annotation_group) %>%
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n))



ggplot(anno_counts,
       aes(x = "All Peaks",
           y = percent,
           fill = annotation_group)) +
  geom_col(color = "black") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Percent of peaks",
    fill = "Genomic annotation Reproducible4"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

length(peaks_filt)

promoter_peaks <- anno_df[
    grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation),
]

dim(promoter_peaks)

saveRDS(promoter_peaks,"data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4.RDS")

promoter_idx <- grepl("^Promoter", anno_df$annotation)

featurecounts_promoter <- featurecounts_filt[promoter_idx,]

dim(featurecounts_promoter)

saveRDS(featurecounts_promoter,"data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")                                         

```


#Color_Pallet

```{r Setting_Up_colors, results="hide"}

ann_colors <- list(
  timepoint_cor = c(
    "Day0" = "#883268",   # Purple
    "Day2" = "#3E7274",  # blue
    "Day4" = "#5AAA464D",  # light green
    "Day5" = "#94C47D",  # Green
    "Day15" = "#C03830",  # red
    "Day30" = "#830C05"  # dark red
  ),
  species_cor = c(
    "H" = "black",  # black
    "C" = "white"   # white
  ),
  individual_cor = c(
    H1 = "#091638", #Blue-Green Darkest
    H2 = "#11185B",
    H3 = "#0F2C71",
    H4 = "#0D568F",
    H4R = "#0D568F",
    H5 = "#1D8296",
    H6 = "#46A389",
    H7 = "#9DD484", #Blue-Green Lightest
    C1 = "#340702", #Brown-Orange darkest
    C2 = "#5D0B02",
    C3 = "#951302",
    C4 = "#D32804",
    C5 = "#F74019",
    C6 = "#FA7A38",
    C7 = "#FCC598"

  )
)

# saveRDS(ann_colors,"data/Data_Sets/ann_colors.RDS")
```

#Fragment Distribution
```{r H3K27acSeq_fragment_distribution, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
frag_counts <- readRDS("data/Raw_Data/H3K27ac_fragment_counts.RDS")
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

frag_counts_meta <- frag_counts %>%
    mutate(Library_ID = str_remove(sample, "\\.sorted\\.bam$")) %>%
    left_join(
        metadata %>%
            dplyr::select(Library_ID, SampleName, Species, Timepoint),
        by = "Library_ID"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Day = Timepoint)

frag_counts_meta <- frag_counts_meta %>%
    mutate(
        frag_class = case_when(
            length < 120 ~ "<120 bp",
            length < 280 ~ "120–280 bp",
            length < 500 ~ "280–500 bp",
            TRUE ~ ">500 bp"
        )
    )

frag_counts_meta <- frag_counts_meta %>%
  mutate(
    frag_class = factor(
      frag_class,
      levels = c("<120 bp", "120–280 bp", "280–500 bp", ">500 bp")
    )
  )

bar_df <- frag_counts_meta %>%
    group_by(Species, SampleName, Day, frag_class) %>%
    summarise(count = sum(count), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(Species, SampleName, Day) %>%
    mutate(prop = count / sum(count)) %>%
    ungroup()

#Distributions
ggplot(frag_counts_meta,
       aes(x = length, y = count)) +
    geom_line(stat = "identity") +
    facet_grid(Species ~ Day) +
    theme_bw()

ggplot(frag_counts_meta,
       aes(x = length, weight = count)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 80, fill = "grey70", color = "white") +
    facet_grid(Species ~ Day) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
        title = "Fragment length distribution",
        x = "Fragment length (bp)",
        y = "Count"
    )

timepoints <- c("Day0", "Day2", "Day4", "Day5", "Day15", "Day30")

for (tp in timepoints) {
  plot_timepoint_c(tp)
}

for (tp in timepoints) {
  plot_timepoint_h(tp)
}


#Stacked Bar Plots
for (d in timepoints) {
  plot_day_bar_H(d)
}

for (d in timepoints) {
  plot_day_bar_C(d)
}

#Bar Plots
for (d in timepoints) {
  plot_day_bar_counts_H(d)
}

for (d in timepoints) {
  plot_day_bar_counts_C(d)
}


```

#FrIP

```{r H3K27acSeq_Peaks_Steven_FRiP, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}


# # 1. Load BAM and peak files
# bam_files <- list.files(
#   "data/Bams/H3K27ac_bam/",
#   pattern = "\\.sorted.bam$",
#   full.names = TRUE
# )
# 
# peak_files <- list.files(
#   "data/Peaks/Steven/H3K27ac/All_NarrowPeaks/",
#   pattern = "narrowPeak$",
#   full.names = TRUE
# )
# 
# # 2. Match BAMs and peaks by sample name
# match_by_name <- function(bam_files, peak_files) {
#   bam_names  <- sub("\\.sorted$", "", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(bam_files)))
#   peak_names <- sub("_peaks$", "", tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(peak_files)))
# 
#   peak_index <- match(bam_names, peak_names)
# 
#   if (any(is.na(peak_index))) {
#     stop("Some BAMs do not have matching peak files")
#   }
# 
#   peak_files[peak_index]
# }
# 
# peak_files_matched <- match_by_name(bam_files, peak_files)
# 
# # 3. Minimal FRiP function (no MAPQ filtering)
# compute_frip_minimal <- function(bam_files, peak_files) {
#   results <- lapply(seq_along(bam_files), function(i) {
#     bam   <- bam_files[i]
#     peaks <- peak_files[i]
#     sample_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(bam))
# 
#     reads <- readGAlignments(bam)
# 
#     pk <- import(peaks)
#     pk <- reduce(pk)
# 
#     hits <- countOverlaps(reads, pk)
#     reads_in_peaks <- sum(hits > 0)
#     total_reads    <- length(reads)
#     frip           <- reads_in_peaks / total_reads
# 
#     data.frame(
#       sample         = sample_name,
#       reads_in_peaks = reads_in_peaks,
#       total_reads    = total_reads,
#       FRiP           = frip
#     )
#   })
# 
#   bind_rows(results)
# }
# 
# # 4. Run FRiP calculation
# frip_table <- compute_frip_minimal(bam_files, peak_files_matched)
# 
# # 5. View results
# frip_table
# 
# frip_table$Library_ID <- sub("\\.sorted$", "", frip_table$sample)
# 
# frip_annot <- dplyr::left_join(frip_table, H3K27ac_Metadata, by = "Library_ID")
# 
# saveRDS(frip_annot,"data/QC/FrIP_annot.RDS")

frip_annot <- readRDS("data/QC/FrIP_annot.RDS")

ggplot(frip_annot, aes(x = Cond, y = FRiP, fill = Cond)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    outlier.shape = 3,   # plus sign
    outlier.size = 4,
    outlier.stroke = 1
  ) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    data = subset(frip_annot, FRiP %in% boxplot(FRiP ~ Cond, plot = FALSE)$out),
    aes(label = CellLine),
    vjust = -0.5,
    size = 3,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "FRiP Scores by Condition",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "FRiP"
  )

```

#Peak Statistics Steven

```{r H3K27acSeq_Peaks_Steven, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
# peak_files_all <- list.files(
#   path = "data/Peaks/Steven",
#   pattern = "\\.narrowPeak$",
#   recursive = TRUE,
#   full.names = TRUE
# )
# 
# peak_files_all <- peak_files_all[
#   grepl("/RepeatablePeaksAltMethod/", peak_files_all)
# ]
# 
# peak_files_repro2 <- list.files(
#   path = "data/Peaks/Steven",
#   pattern = "_peaks_repeatable2\\.bed$",
#   recursive = TRUE,
#   full.names = TRUE
# )
# 
# peak_files_repro2 <- peak_files_repro2[
#   grepl("/RepeatablePeaksAltMethod/", peak_files_repro2)
# ]
# 
# peak_files_repro3 <- list.files(
#   path = "data/Peaks/Steven",
#   pattern = "_peaks_repeatable3\\.bed$",
#   recursive = TRUE,
#   full.names = TRUE
# )
# 
# peak_files_repro3 <- peak_files_repro3[
#   grepl("/RepeatablePeaksAltMethod/", peak_files_repro3)
# ]
# 
# peak_files_repro4 <- list.files(
#   path = "data/Peaks/Steven",
#   pattern = "_peaks_repeatable4\\.bed$",
#   recursive = TRUE,
#   full.names = TRUE
# )
# 
# peak_files_repro4 <- peak_files_repro4[
#   grepl("/RepeatablePeaksAltMethod/", peak_files_repro4)
# ]
# 
# raw_gr <- lapply(peak_files_all, import)
# 
# rep2_gr <- lapply(peak_files_repro2, function(f) {
#   import(f, format = "narrowPeak")
# })
# 
# rep3_gr <- lapply(peak_files_repro3, function(f) {
#   import(f, format = "narrowPeak")
# })
# 
# rep4_gr <- lapply(peak_files_repro4, function(f) {
#   import(f, format = "narrowPeak")
# })
# 
# sample_names_raw  <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(peak_files_all))
# sample_names_rep2 <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(peak_files_repro2))
# sample_names_rep3 <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(peak_files_repro3))
# sample_names_rep4 <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(peak_files_repro4))
# 
# names(raw_gr)  <- sample_names_raw
# names(rep2_gr) <- sample_names_rep2
# names(rep3_gr) <- sample_names_rep3
# names(rep4_gr) <- sample_names_rep4
# 
# get_sample <- function(x) {
#   gsub("(_peaks.*|\\.narrowPeak$|\\.bed$)", "", x)
# }
# 
# mean_fraglen <- function(gr) {
#   mean(width(gr))
# }
# 
# raw_counts <- data.frame(
#   sample      = get_sample(names(raw_gr)),
#   raw         = sapply(raw_gr, length),
#   raw_fraglen = sapply(raw_gr, mean_fraglen)
# )
# 
# rep2_counts <- data.frame(
#   sample       = get_sample(names(rep2_gr)),
#   rep2         = sapply(rep2_gr, length),
#   rep2_fraglen = sapply(rep2_gr, mean_fraglen)
# )
# 
# rep3_counts <- data.frame(
#   sample       = get_sample(names(rep3_gr)),
#   rep3         = sapply(rep3_gr, length),
#   rep3_fraglen = sapply(rep3_gr, mean_fraglen)
# )
# 
# rep4_counts <- data.frame(
#   sample       = get_sample(names(rep4_gr)),
#   rep4         = sapply(rep4_gr, length),
#   rep4_fraglen = sapply(rep4_gr, mean_fraglen)
# )
# 
# qc_counts <- raw_counts %>%
#   full_join(rep2_counts, by = "sample") %>%
#   full_join(rep3_counts, by = "sample") %>%
#   full_join(rep4_counts, by = "sample") %>%
#   arrange(sample)
# 
# qc_counts <- qc_counts %>%
#   mutate(
#     rep2_fraction = rep2 / raw,
#     rep3_fraction = rep3 / raw,
#     rep4_fraction = rep4 / raw
#   )
# 
# qc_counts_annotated <- qc_counts %>%
#   left_join(H3K27ac_Metadata,
#             by = c("sample" = "Library_ID"))
# 
# cond_levels <- c(
#   "C_Day0", "C_Day2", "C_Day4", "C_Day5", "C_Day15", "C_Day30",
#   "H_Day0", "H_Day2", "H_Day4", "H_Day5", "H_Day15", "H_Day30"
# )
# 
# qc_counts_annotated <- qc_counts_annotated %>%
#   mutate(
#     Cond = factor(Cond, levels = cond_levels)
#   )
# 
# Timepoint_levels <- c(
#   "Day0", "Day2", "Day4", "Day5", "Day15", "Day30"
#   )
# 
# qc_counts_annotated <- qc_counts_annotated %>%
#   mutate(
#     Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = Timepoint_levels)
#   )
# 
# saveRDS(
#   qc_counts_annotated,
#   "data/QC/H3K27ac_concat_peaks_steven.RDS"
# )

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_Peaks_Steven_PeakNumber, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
qc_counts_annotated <- readRDS("data/QC/H3K27ac_concat_peaks_steven.RDS")

qc_long <- qc_counts_annotated %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(raw, rep2, rep3, rep4, rep2_fraction, rep3_fraction, rep4_fraction),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )

#BySpecies
qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("raw", "rep2", "rep3", "rep4")) %>%
  group_by(Species, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Species) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Peak set",
    y = "Number of peaks"
  )

#Human By Cond
qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("raw", "rep2", "rep3", "rep4")) %>%
  filter(grepl("^H_", Cond)) %>%
  group_by(Cond, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Cond) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Peak set", y = "Number of peaks")

#Chimp By Cond
qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("raw", "rep2", "rep3", "rep4")) %>%
  filter(grepl("^C_", Cond)) %>%
  group_by(Cond, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Cond) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Peak set", y = "Number of peaks")


# By Timepoint
qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("raw", "rep2", "rep3", "rep4")) %>%
  group_by(Timepoint, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Peak set", y = "Number of peaks")



qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("rep2_fraction", "rep3_fraction", "rep4_fraction")) %>%
  group_by(Species, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Species) +
  theme_bw()

# Human
qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(
    Species == "H",
    metric %in% c("rep2_fraction", "rep3_fraction", "rep4_fraction")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Cond, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Cond) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Retention metric", y = "Fraction of raw peaks retained")

# Chimp
qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(
    Species == "C",
    metric %in% c("rep2_fraction", "rep3_fraction", "rep4_fraction")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Cond, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Cond) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Retention metric", y = "Fraction of raw peaks retained")

qc_labeled <- qc_long %>%
  filter(
    metric %in% c("rep2_fraction", "rep3_fraction", "rep4_fraction")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Timepoint, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) |
                 value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

qc_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(qc_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Retention metric", y = "Fraction of raw peaks retained")
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_Peaks_Steven_PeakLength, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
qc_long_frag <- qc_counts_annotated %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(raw_fraglen, rep2_fraglen, rep3_fraglen, rep4_fraglen),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric = factor(
      metric,
      levels = c("raw_fraglen", "rep2_fraglen", "rep3_fraglen", "rep4_fraglen"),
      labels = c("raw", "rep2", "rep3", "rep4")
    )
  )

frag_labeled <- qc_long_frag %>%
  group_by(Species, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

frag_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(frag_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Species) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Average fragment length across stages",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean fragment length (bp)"
  )

frag_labeled <- qc_long_frag %>%
  group_by(Timepoint, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

frag_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(frag_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Timepoint) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Timepoint: fragment length",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean fragment length (bp)"
  )

frag_labeled <- qc_long_frag %>%
  filter(grepl("^C_", Cond)) %>%
  group_by(Cond, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

frag_labeled %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(frag_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Cond) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "C samples: fragment length",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean fragment length (bp)"
  )

frag_labeled <- qc_long_frag %>%
  filter(grepl("^H_", Cond)) %>%
  group_by(Cond, metric) %>%
  mutate(
    q1 = quantile(value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    iqr = q3 - q1,
    is_outlier = value < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | value > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

frag_labeled%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(frag_labeled, is_outlier),
    aes(label = SampleName),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Cond) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "H samples: fragment length",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean fragment length (bp)"
  )


```




#AllDays
##Reproducible2
###Boxplot_Histograms

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Human, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Human####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Human <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("H"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

log2cpm_Human_Day0 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 0 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 0
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Human_Day2 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 2 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 2
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day4 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 4 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 4
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day5 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 5 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 5
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Human_Day15 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 15 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 15
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day30 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 30 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 30
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Chimp, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Chimp####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Chimp <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("C"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample - Chimp
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

log2cpm_Chimp_Day0 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 0 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 0
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Chimp_Day2 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 2 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 2
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day4 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 4 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 4
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day5 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 5 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 5
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Chimp_Day15 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 15 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 15
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day30 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 30 Reproducible2",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 30
          Reproducible2", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Cor, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible2"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Outlier_Filtering,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible2\nOutliers Removed"
)


```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Cor_Promoters, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")  
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible2 \n Promoters Only"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Outlier_Filtering_Promoters,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS") 
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible2\nOutliers Removed \n Promoters Only"
)

```

##Filt Reproducible2
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_GenomicRegions_Filtered,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}

peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")

H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition.RDS")

Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_FilteredCondition_GRanges <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_FilteredCondition_GRanges.RDS")

Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")

H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition <-
    H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc[
        rownames(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc) %in%
        rownames(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition),
    ]

# saveRDS(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition,"data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition <-
    H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc[
        rownames(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc) %in%
        rownames(Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition),
    ]

# saveRDS(Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition,"data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

```

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Human_Filtered, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Human####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Human <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("H"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

log2cpm_Human_Day0 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 0 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 0
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Human_Day2 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 2 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 2
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day4 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 4 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 4
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day5 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 5 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 5
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Human_Day15 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 15 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 15
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day30 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 30 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 30
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Chimp_Filtered, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Chimp####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Chimp <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("C"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample - Chimp
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

log2cpm_Chimp_Day0 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 0 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 0
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Chimp_Day2 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 2 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 2
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day4 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 4 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 4
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day5 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 5 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 5
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Chimp_Day15 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 15 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 15
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day30 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 30 Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 30
          Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Cor_Filtered, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
```
