```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Cor_Filtered, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Outlier_Filtering_Filtered,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Outliers Removed "
)


```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Cor_Promoters_Filtered, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS") 
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Outliers Removed \n Promoters Only"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_Outlier_Filtering_Promoters_Filtered,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS") 
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Outliers Removed \n Promoters Only"
)

```

##Reproducible3
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")

####All####
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm)

hist(log2cpm,  main = "Histogram of all counts Reproducible3",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =4 )

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_Human, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Human####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Human <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("H"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Human_Day0 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 0 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 0
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Human_Day2 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 2 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 2
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day4 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 4 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 4
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day5 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 5 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 5
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Human_Day15 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 15 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 15
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day30 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 30 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 30
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_Chimp, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

####Chimp####
log2cpm_Chimp <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("C"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample - Chimp
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

log2cpm_Chimp_Day0 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 0 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 0
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Chimp_Day2 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 2 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 2
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day4 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 4 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 4
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day5 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 5 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 5
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Chimp_Day15 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 15 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 15
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day30 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 30 Reproducible3",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 30
          Reproducible3", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_Cor, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation\nReproducible3"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_OutlierFiltering_Cor,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

library(RColorBrewer)

my_breaks <- seq(0, 1, length.out = 101)
my_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("darkblue","blue","lightblue", "white","salmon","red","darkred"))(100)

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
  main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Outliers Removed \n (Reproducible3)"
)

```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_Cor_Promoters, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")  
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible3 \n Promotors"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_Outlier_Filtering_Promoters,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS") 
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible3 \n No Outliers \n Promoters"
)

```
##Reproducible4
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")

####All####
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm)

hist(log2cpm,  main = "Histogram of all counts Reproducible4",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =4 )

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```


```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_Human, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Human####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Human <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("H"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Human_Day0 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 0 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 0
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Human_Day2 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 2 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 2
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day4 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 4 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 4
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day5 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 5 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 5
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Human_Day15 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 15 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 15
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Human_Day30 <- log2cpm_Human %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Human_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Human_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Human Day 30 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Human_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Human Day 30
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_Chimp, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}
####Chimp####
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log = TRUE)

log2cpm_Chimp <- log2cpm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(starts_with("C"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Chimp_Day0 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day0"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 0 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day0, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 0
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size


log2cpm_Chimp_Day2 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day2"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 2 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day2, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 2
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day4 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day4"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 4 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day4, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 4
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day5 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day5"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 5 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day5, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 5
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size




log2cpm_Chimp_Day15 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day15"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 15 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day15, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 15
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size



log2cpm_Chimp_Day30 <- log2cpm_Chimp %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::select(contains("Day30"))

col_labels <- colnames(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30)

hist(as.matrix(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30),
     main = "Histogram of all counts - Chimp Day 30 Reproducible4",
     xlab = expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"),
     col = 4)

boxplot(log2cpm_Chimp_Day30, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Chimp Day 30
          Reproducible4", xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size
```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_Cor, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible4"
)

```


###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_OutlierFiltering_Cor,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Outliers Removed) \n (Reproducible4)")

```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_Cor_Promoters, fig.height=10,fig.width=10}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")  
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)


rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible4 \n Promotors"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_Outlier_Filtering_Promoters,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS") 
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor

pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible4 \n No Outliers \n Promoters"
)

```
#No_Day4
##Reproducible2
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")

group <- metadata$Cond

hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of filtered counts using lcpm >1 in 4/7 species-timepoints - Day 5",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample
        Reproducible2, Day 5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_Cor,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4.RDS")
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n 
        Reproducible2 (Day 5)"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_OutlierFiltering, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Reproducible 2 - Day5) \n (Outliers Removed)"
)

```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_Cor_Promoters,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n 
        Reproducible2 (Day 5 \n Promoters)"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_OutlierFiltering_Promoters, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Reproducible 2 - Day5) \n (Outliers Removed) \n Promoters"
)

```


##Filt Reproducible2


```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_GenomicRegions_Filtered2,fig.height=4,fig.width=4}

peaks_filt <- readRDS("data/Peaks/peaks_filt_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2.RDS")

H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition <- readRDS("data/DGE/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition.RDS")

Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_FilteredCondition_GRanges <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_FilteredCondition_GRanges.RDS")

Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")

H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition <-
    H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc[
        rownames(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc) %in%
        rownames(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No4_NoRep_NoOut_FilteredCondition),
    ]

# saveRDS(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition,"data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition <-
    H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc[
        rownames(H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc) %in%
        rownames(Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition),
    ]

# saveRDS(Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition,"data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

```

###Boxplot_Histograms

```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_Filtered2, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")

group <- metadata$Cond

hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of filtered counts \n Reproducible 2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample
        Reproducible2, Day 5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_Cor_Filtered2,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible2 (Day 5) \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_OutlierFiltering_Filtered2, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Reproducible 2 - Day5) \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n (Outliers Removed)"
)

```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_Cor_Promoters_Filtered2,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Day5 Cardiac Mesoderm \n Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Promoters Only "
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No4_OutlierFiltering_Promoters_Filtered2, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Day5 Cardiac Mesoderm \n Reproducible2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Promoters Only  \n (Outliers Removed)"
)

```

##Reproducible3
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")


group <- metadata$Cond


hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of counts - Reproducible3 Day5",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Reproducible3 Day5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No4_Cor,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible3 Day5"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No4_OutlierFiltering,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible3 Day5, Outliers Removed"
)

```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No4_Cor_Promoters,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n 
        Reproducible3 (Day 5) \n Promoters"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No4_OutlierFiltering_Promoters, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Reproducible 3 - No Day4) \n (Outliers Removed) \n Promoters"
)

```

##Reproducible4
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) 
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")

group <- metadata$Cond


hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of counts Reproducible4 Day5",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Reproducible4 Day5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No4_Cor,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \nReproducible4 Day5"
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No4_OutlierFiltering,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible4  Day5. Outliers Removed"
)

```

####Promoters
#####Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No4_Cor_Promoters,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n 
        Reproducible4 (Day 5) \n Promoters"
)

```

#####Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No4_OutlierFiltering_Promoters, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promotors_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


pheatmap(
  Cor_log2cpm,
  fontsize_row = 5,
  fontsize_col = 5,
  annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor", "individual_cor")],
  annotation_colors = ann_colors,
  clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
  clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
  color = my_colors,
  breaks = my_breaks,
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Reproducible 4 - Day5) \n (Outliers Removed) \n Promoters"
)

```

#No_Day5
##Reproducible2
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5")

hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of counts Reproducible2 No Day5",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Reproducible2 No Day5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No5_Cor,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_No5.RDS")
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE) 

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5")
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


print(
  pheatmap(Cor_log2cpm,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n(Spearman-log2CPM->1 4 or more in a Species-Timpoint - Day 5)")
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible2_No5_OutlierFiltering, fig.height=8,fig.width=8}
counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day5","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


print(
  pheatmap(Cor_log2cpm,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \nReproducible2 No Day5, Outleirs Removed)")
)

```

##Reproducible3
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5")



hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of counts Reproducible3 No Day5",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Reproducible3 No Day5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No5_Cor,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5")
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


print(
  pheatmap(Cor_log2cpm,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \nReproducible3 No Day5")
)

```

###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible3_No5_OutlierFiltering,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


print(
  pheatmap(Cor_log2cpm,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \nReproducible3 No day5, Outliers Removed")
)

```


##Reproducible4
###Boxplot_Histograms
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=12}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5")


hist(log2cpm, main = "Histogram of filtered counts Reproducible4 No Day5",
     xlab =expression("Log"[2]*" counts-per-million"), col =5 )

col_labels <- metadata$SampleName

boxplot(log2cpm, main = "Boxplots of log cpm per sample Reproducible4 No Day5",xaxt = "n", xlab= "")
axis(1,
     at = 1:length(col_labels),  # positions (one per sample)
     labels = col_labels,        # your labels vector
     las = 2,               # rotate text vertically (like srt=90)
     cex.axis = 0.6)        # shrink label size

```

###Cor_HeatMap
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No5_Cor,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS") %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata  %>% 
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5")
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


print(
  pheatmap(Cor_log2cpm,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \nReproducible4 No Day5")
)

```



###Outlier_Filtering
```{r H3K27acSeq_FeatureCounts_Reproducible4_No5_OutlierFiltering,fig.height=8,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")
  
  
######Cor_HeatMap####
Cor_log2cpm <- cor(log2cpm, method = "spearman")
individual <- metadata$Individual
species <- metadata$Species
timepoint <- metadata$Timepoint
timepoint <- factor(timepoint,levels = c("Day0","Day2","Day4","Day15","Day30"))
Cor_metadata <- data.frame(
  sample_cor = colnames(Cor_log2cpm),
  species_cor = species,
  timepoint_cor = timepoint,
  individual_cor = individual
)

rownames(Cor_metadata) <- Cor_metadata$sample_cor


print(
  pheatmap(Cor_log2cpm,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         fontsize_col = 5,
         annotation_col = Cor_metadata[, c("species_cor", "timepoint_cor","individual_cor")],
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         clustering_distance_rows = "correlation",
         clustering_distance_cols = "correlation",
         main = "Sample-Sample Correlation \n Reproducible4 No Day5, Outliers Removed")
)

```

```{r Updating Website, eval = FALSE}

# git -> commit all changes
# git -> push
wflow_publish("analysis/QC_Checks.Rmd")

```
